reviews.review_description: This game has been one of the greats. Super colorful. All the updates have always added something fun. The customization is top tier. You could tell this game was loved by its makers. So sad to see it go but I hope to see more like it and from the developer in the future!!

Frenzies was an amazing breath of fresh air when it came to VR Shooters. With it focusing more on Deathmatch for its round types, as well as Akimbo being the main focus of the gunplay, it was enjoyable experience amongst the Military Coated Tactical Battle Royale and Extraction Shooters. Sadly, with nDreams suffering layoffs over the months, the game was not far from leaving out the door as well. Thanks again for the wonderful time Frenzies.

developer_response.body:
Hi there,

Thank you for your review! We're so happy to hear that you think FRENZIES is the best free shooter out there :D

We love FRENZIES and think about it all the time, we have released updates every month this year including major updates such as The Hangar update, March Update, Big Boss update, Progression update and we have just announced that we will have another update next week!

We are continuing to improve FRENZIES Early Access based on the feedback from our community and are continuing to work towards a full launch for FRENZIES.

We've never announced an exact date for FRENZIES coming out of Early Access but rest assured that we're working towards that goal as soon as we can.

Thank you for your feedback, if you have anymore questions make sure to join our Discord: discord.gg/frenziesvr

reviews.review_description: Realy fun
Fun

Update 7/29/25

Standing play is slightly better after the updates but it still isn't great if you turn with your feet or stray even a little in the room.

Menus pop up in odd places including inches from your face so you have to keep resetting your position to use them.

I hope the developers add roomscale support in the full release and fully test it while standing and turning with their feet, because it would be a shame if an action game like this required you to play it while being sedentary.￼ 

Original Review

Currently the game is broken if you turn with your feet. It’s only suitable for seated play or standing still using the thumb stick to turn. To qualify as supporting standing play, a game has to work when turning with your body, not just when using the thumb stick to turn.

If they get standing play working I’ll try it again. Hopefully after that they’ll add roomscale support.

developer_response.body:
Hey there,

It's good to see you again! We've done rigorous testing to ensure that standing play works and are able to turn your feet without any issues. We would like to know more about your experience so we can further improve the game.

Please join the Discord and share a video of your issue so we can resolve your problem: discord.gg/frenziesvr

developer_response.body:
Hi there, we're sorry to hear that you're feeling frustrated with your experience recently - that's not what we wanted! 

In our latest update, we've introduced progression to frenzies to reward players for playing (a long awaited community request). This has meant that all players, not just new ones, have had a 'reset'. We know this is a little frustrating for long-time players, but you'll be able to unlock all weapons within around 20 matches! 

We hope you'll try frenzies again. We're building a game based off community feedback. We've got another major update coming in June, but this update was probably the biggest change for long-time players like yourself.

reviews.review_description: Quick and to the point with team based matches. Fast paced constant action. The changing game modes keeps things fresh between rounds. The gestures and trash talk add to the games personality.
Amazing great and the best game in history

After paying this in early access it's definitely my favorite competitive VR shooter! The game modes are diverse and fun, and when you get a team working together everything really feels good!

My only complaint is that the time between rounds feels excessively long, and changing weapons mid-game takes you too far out of the action.

developer_response.body:
Hi there,

Thank you for playing! It is great to hear that FRENZIES is your favourite shooter considering we're still in Early Access. Thank you for the feedback on our round types, we will add plenty more to make it even more chaotic!

We understand your concern regarding round transition times and we are always looking to improve. We have been making updates on the timers and will continue doing so based on feedback. If you have more feedback, make sure to join our Discord: discord.gg/frenziesvr

- Richi

reviews.review_description:
Add Botmatch or some single player practice mode please. Honestly surprised this is an early access game. It's amazing! To the people giving this one star for the voice chat: Just turn it off. It's not needed. This game is basically  Squid game + Hyper Dash + Fall Guys. That's a recipe for success. However there is a lack of variety in the game modes. I understand it's in early access but swapping teams is not a new mode. The guns also need a bit of work. The 2 shotguns are almost the same gun. One has more ammo making it better. The semi auto pistol is a weaker SMG and the Revolver and Assault Rifle are the only truly unique weapons. This is what I would recommend adding:

Smarter Bots: The bots just run around with one gun. Let the bots duel wield. They are also pretty stupid. I was shooting at a bot and they just stood there acting like I didn't exist.


Server Browser: we need a way to select games better than quick matches. So I can join lobbies that are starting rather than games in progress.


Botmatch or training: there needs to be a firing range or something to train. I would like a practice mode or something where I can pick the round and teams to practice on the levels I struggle with (like button bash) 



Please consider making these adjustments and keep working on this amazing game!

Oh. And fix the bug where in the game you can't select anything in the universal menu. And sometimes I glitch out of my body. Also: how do I get extra faces?

developer_response.body:
Hi there,

Thank you so much for the feedback! It is so great to hear that you're enjoying FRENZIES so much right now :D

We understand your concern regarding round types but we already have 10 round types available but we will continue adding a lot more (hint: a new round type will be coming very soon!)

We appreciate your feedback regarding bots, servers, and training modes. These are definitely something that we are looking into but we cannot share more on this yet.

Regarding our digital faces, we only have the ones available in-game right now but more will be added.

Thank you again for playing FRENZIES and make sure to join our Discord to be part of the community: discord.gg/frenziesvr

reviews.review_description: Wewwwwwwwwwww

Update 3-28-25

I’ve reached just over three hours of play (not straight)
Game modes.  This game focused heavily on keeping came modes we know in common shooters but with a funny twist and it works.

Capture the pig (not the actual name)

Depending on how many human players are in a room there is a pig your team has to capture and hold onto to get points.  You have one hand free to kill use a weapon but I believe the big acts as a shield from enemy fire.  Round lasts three minutes and I’ve been in a room with up to two pigs.

Pop up points.  This is domination but you have four minutes to capture three points by holding bars until they turn your color.  Capture all three and the round ends.

Dance off? (Headquarters)

You head to the enemy spawn and stay on their dance floor to collect points.  Can be painful if your team sucks and boring if your team is too sweaty, but it is a good time.

Red light green light (tDM 1 and deathmatch)
During green light enemies are vulnerable and during red light you damage yourself if you shoot the enemy.  This game does a defenseless last stand where teamates can pick you up and respawn you without giving you the kill so it is important to headshot or Finnish a player during green light.  Great game mode and amazing map.

Royal escort( escort type mission)
Get points by having your VIp capture a point while you protect them.  Staying by VIP heals you.  When a team VIP dies your team loses respawn ability and it is a battle of attrition.

canniball 
A ball drops in the middle of the map and you grab it and take it to the enemy hole.  You can throw it or place it.  If you wipe a team they can all respawn on you at the goal and prevent the goal so get good at throwing it in.

Button smash TDM with a panick button.
Players have a long corridor they fight to enter enemy spawn and pull a lever.  This hits the button and ends the game.

This is all I’ve seen but game plays as intended and feels very fresh.  It does feel like a daycare, but this game is smooth with little glitches from what I have experienced minus the gun holster being in the way to grab an object lower than chest level.  If you want to try it pick it up as early access because it will be an acquired taste but in a very refreshing way.  Great job devs.
Update 3-27-25

Got in the game for thirty minutes.  Game modes are great with a twist.  I like debuff and buff mechanics.  Reload works for playstyle very well.  Movement speed is just right. Entering a game for me required starting a team lobby then starting a game which loaded me into a full game.  As of now the game is good fun.  This is a solid VR game that works as intended as long as there are players it should succeed.


Hello all,

I am not big on bashing games so I will try and make this as objective as possible.  First visually the game is pleasing.  From what I felt in the lobby the game feels like it has potential to be smooth and great.  Guns are responsive while firing and movement is crisp and tight.  The problem I noticed in the lobby is something I feel when companies are new to VR they want to simplify controls.  I believe this game may be targeting a younger crowd, but the reload by pushing a button then guiding a set mag into the slot seems super silly.  This is VR and I feel this kind of hand holding will hurt interest in the long run because both young and old players I run into generally hate this kind of foot half in the water approach. Second the lack of servers is going to kill this game.  When you attempt to join a game you cannot look for available rooms or start your own room so you go to a black screen and then get kicked back to the lobby.  Feel free to look at the track record of VR games that followed this model and you will find they failed.  At the very least we should be able to see all rooms with people available to play with and then click it and enter.  This quick match set up only will sink the game as the new game feeling wears off and people just want to jump into a game.  This brings me to the next issue in absence of players there really should be bots and you should allow players to  create a lobby and include the bots so people can come and go and their gameplay will have enemies to kill.  I get this is an early access game, but as my title says this is solarice reborn and it made all the same mistakes solarice made so while   Feel this game has potential it’s only saving grace right now is it is free.  I strongly urge new VR players to steer clear of this game because I bought solarice and I never got to play because of the above issues.  Players should not have to go to a discord and set up a play date to hop into a lobby and play a game.  Until the above issues fixed I truly believe this game is doomed to fail and that is sad because just the lobby movement alone feels awesome.  Good luck developer Ms I hope you are able to make those changes because they are essential.
One thing though add more maps and game modes. That's all
